container_properties.description: Defines the configuration for the containers in the job, including memory and CPU requirements.

deregister_on_new_revision.description: Indicates whether to deregister the job definition when a new revision is created.

ecs_properties.description: Specifies the properties specific to the Amazon ECS orchestration platform.

name.description: The name of the job definition, which must be unique within the region.

node_properties.description: Defines the properties for a multi-node parallel job.

parameters.description: A set of key-value pairs that are passed to the job at runtime.

platform_capabilities.description: Specifies the platform capabilities required by the job, such as 'EC2' or 'FARGATE'.

propagate_tags.description: Determines whether to propagate tags from the job definition to the tasks.

scheduling_priority.description: Defines the priority for scheduling the job, with higher numbers indicating higher priority.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the job definition for organizing and managing resources.

type.description: Specifies the type of job definition, such as 'container' or 'multinode'.

eks_properties.description: Optional block for configuring EKS properties including pod properties.
eks_properties.type: list(object({ pod_properties: object({ dns_policy: string, host_network: bool, service_account_name: string, share_process_namespace: bool, containers: list(object({ args: list(string), command: list(string), image: string, image_pull_policy: string, name: string, env: list(object({ name: string, value: string })), resources: object({ limits: map(string), requests: map(string) }), security_context: object({ privileged: bool, read_only_root_file_system: bool, run_as_group: number, run_as_non_root: bool, run_as_user: number }), volume_mounts: list(object({ mount_path: string, name: string, read_only: bool })) })) }), image_pull_secret: object({ name: string }), init_containers: list(object({ args: list(string), command: list(string), image: string, image_pull_policy: string, name: string, env: list(object({ name: string, value: string })), resources: object({ limits: map(string), requests: map(string) }), security_context: object({ privileged: bool, read_only_root_file_system: bool, run_as_group: number, run_as_non_root: bool, run_as_user: number }), volume_mounts: list(object({ mount_path: string, name: string, read_only: bool })) })), metadata: object({ labels: map(string) }), volumes: list(object({ name: string, empty_dir: object({ medium: string, size_limit: string }), host_path: object({ path: string }), secret: object({ optional: bool, secret_name: string }) })) }))

retry_strategy.description: Optional block for defining the retry strategy for the job definition.
retry_strategy.type: list(object({ attempts: number, evaluate_on_exit: list(object({ action: string, on_exit_code: string, on_reason: string, on_status_reason: string })) }))

timeout.description: Optional block for specifying the job timeout configuration.
